---
title: "Joseph Comyns Carr"
---

## Joseph Comyns Carr

**Dates:** (1849-1916)

### Description

editor of the <i>English Illustrated Magazine</i>

### Letters

- Letter from July 24th [1886]
- Letter from May 28th [1886]
- Letter from May 21st [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
